channel.title: iron on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in iron on funPlantGenes

item.title: ZmFDR4
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmFDR4 Gene Name: Fe deficiency-related 4 Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Zea mays Fe deficiency-related 4 (ZmFDR4) functions as an iron transporter in the plastids of monocots.

item.title: ZmFLS2;fls2
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb256000 Gene Symbol: ZmFLS2 fls2 Gene Name: flavonol synthase2 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmIRT2

item.title: ZmTAT;naat4
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb240650 Gene Symbol: ZmTAT naat4 Gene Name: nicotianamine aminotransferase4 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmZIP5
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb277370 Gene Symbol: ZmZIP5 Gene Name: zinc-regulated, iron-regulated transporter-like protein5 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.
